title: Improved Enchanted Books
body:
![allbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEggs/Modrinth/main/Sprite-0001.png)
## Description

**Improved Enchanted Books** - In this texture pack that adds a unique book texture for each enchantment. Instantly identify the enchantment book without having to hover your mouse over the item.

![book](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEggs/Modrinth/main/2023-11-18_13.45.27_2.png)
- - - -
![Optifine required](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
This pack uses an OptiFine feature called CIT Resewn.
- - - -
